telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 27, 2026 Markets turned risk-off as Gulf tensions escalated, but the traditional playbook broke down with gold unexpectedly under pressure despite safe-haven demand. The stagflation regime intensified as geopolitical risks collided with persistent inflation fears, leaving investors caught between recession hedges and commodity exposure conflicts.
